Does Himalayan salt help with muscle cramps?

expanded_element.title: Himalayan Salt : Benefits, Precautions and Dosage | 1mg
expanded_element.description: Himalayan salt contains magnesium in sufficient quantities and thus helps to overcome muscle cramps. Drinking water mixed with a spoon of Himalayan salt helps to get relief from muscle cramps within a few minutes[11][12].

items.title: Are pink salt crystals good for you?

expanded_element.title: The rising popularity of Himalayan pink salt - IGN - Iodine Global Network
expanded_element.description: While Himalayan pink salt is often marketed as a healthier alternative to ordinary table salt, this is not the case. A main critical issue is that these salts are not iodized. If used as a substitute for iodized salt, Himalayan pink salt could contribute to iodine deficiency, particularly as its popularity grows.
